---
title: "Recipes (Filter)"
format: html
---

```{=html}
<style>
  #recipe-search {
    width: 100%;
    padding: 10px 14px;
    font-size: 1rem;
    margin-bottom: 1.2rem;
    border: 1px solid #ccc;
    border-radius: 6px;
    box-sizing: border-box;
  }
  #letter-nav {
    margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
    font-size: 1.1rem;
    line-height: 2;
  }
  #letter-nav a {
    text-decoration: none;
    font-weight: bold;
  }
  .letter-section h2 {
    border-bottom: 2px solid #ddd;
    padding-bottom: 4px;
    margin-top: 1.5rem;
  }
  .recipe-list {
    list-style: none;
    padding-left: 0;
    columns: 2;
    column-gap: 2rem;
  }
  .recipe-item {
    padding: 2px 0;
    break-inside: avoid;
  }
  #no-results {
    display: none;
    color: #888;
    font-style: italic;
    margin-top: 1rem;
  }
</style>

<input type="text" id="recipe-search" placeholder="Search recipes..." />

<div id="letter-nav">
<a href="#section-2">2</a> &middot; <a href="#section-A">A</a> &middot; <a href="#section-B">B</a> &middot; <a href="#section-C">C</a> &middot; <a href="#section-D">D</a> &middot; <a href="#section-E">E</a> &middot; <a href="#section-F">F</a> &middot; <a href="#section-G">G</a> &middot; <a href="#section-H">H</a> &middot; <a href="#section-I">I</a> &middot; <a href="#section-J">J</a> &middot; <a href="#section-L">L</a> &middot; <a href="#section-M">M</a> &middot; <a href="#section-N">N</a> &middot; <a href="#section-O">O</a> &middot; <a href="#section-P">P</a> &middot; <a href="#section-R">R</a> &middot; <a href="#section-S">S</a> &middot; <a href="#section-T">T</a> &middot; <a href="#section-V">V</a> &middot; <a href="#section-W">W</a> &middot; <a href="#section-Y">Y</a> &middot; <a href="#section-Z">Z</a>
</div>

<div class="letter-section" id="section-2">
<h2>2</h2>
<ul class="recipe-list">
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/22nd%20State%20Amber%20Ale%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">22nd State Amber Ale</a></li>
</ul>
</div>

<div class="letter-section" id="section-A">
<h2>A</h2>
<ul class="recipe-list">
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/A%20to%20CTZ%20IPA%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">A to CTZ IPA</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/Amarillo%20Pale%20Ale%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions%20-%20SHS.pdf">Amarillo Pale Ale - SHS</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/Amberlievable%20Amber%20Ale%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">Amberlievable Amber Ale</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/Apollo%20Single%20Hop%20Pale%20Ale%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">Apollo Single Hop Pale Ale</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/Appalled%20Apollo%20IPA%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">Appalled Apollo IPA</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/Azacca%20Pale%20Ale%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">Azacca Pale Ale</a></li>
</ul>
</div>

<div class="letter-section" id="section-B">
<h2>B</h2>
<ul class="recipe-list">
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/Beans%20The%20Elf%20Christmas%20Ale%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">Beans The Elf Christmas Ale</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/Biscuits%20and%20Jam%20ESB%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">Biscuits and Jam ESB</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/Bitter%20Butler%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">Bitter Butler</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/Bitter%20Texan%20IPA%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">Bitter Texan IPA</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/Blackberry%20Witbier%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">Blackberry Witbier</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/Bourbon%20Barrel%20Porter%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">Bourbon Barrel Porter</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/British%20Sunset%20Golden%20Ale%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">British Sunset Golden Ale</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/Butlers%20Irish%20Red%20Ale%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">Butlers Irish Red Ale</a></li>
</ul>
</div>

<div class="letter-section" id="section-C">
<h2>C</h2>
<ul class="recipe-list">
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/Cashmere%20Blonde%20Ale%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">Cashmere Blonde Ale</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/Chinook%20IPA%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">Chinook IPA</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/Christmas%20Porter%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">Christmas Porter</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/Cluster%20SMaSH%20Pale%20Ale%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">Cluster SMaSH Pale Ale</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/Coconut%20Hefeweizen%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">Coconut Hefeweizen</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/Cruisin%20Canoe%20IPA%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">Cruisin Canoe IPA</a></li>
</ul>
</div>

<div class="letter-section" id="section-D">
<h2>D</h2>
<ul class="recipe-list">
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/Dark%20Chocolate%20Strawberry%20Stout%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">Dark Chocolate Strawberry Stout</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/Dillo%20Trolley%20Pale%20Ale%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">Dillo Trolley Pale Ale</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/Dry%20Hop%20Blonde%20Ale%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">Dry Hop Blonde Ale</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/Dunkles%20Bock%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">Dunkles Bock</a></li>
</ul>
</div>

<div class="letter-section" id="section-E">
<h2>E</h2>
<ul class="recipe-list">
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/Elani%20Pale%20Ale%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">Elani Pale Ale</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/English%20Pale%20Ale%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">English Pale Ale</a></li>
</ul>
</div>

<div class="letter-section" id="section-F">
<h2>F</h2>
<ul class="recipe-list">
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/Frayed%20Aglet%20IPA%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">Frayed Aglet IPA</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/Fruity%20McCutie%20Juicy%20IPA%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Sheet.pdf">Fruity McCutie Juicy IPA</a></li>
</ul>
</div>

<div class="letter-section" id="section-G">
<h2>G</h2>
<ul class="recipe-list">
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/Glaring%20Grackle%20Imperial%20Stout%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">Glaring Grackle Imperial Stout</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/Granite%20Dome%20Oat%20Stout%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">Granite Dome Oat Stout</a></li>
</ul>
</div>

<div class="letter-section" id="section-H">
<h2>H</h2>
<ul class="recipe-list">
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/Haze%20Austin%20Juicy%20NEIPA%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Sheet.pdf">Haze Austin Juicy NEIPA</a></li>
</ul>
</div>

<div class="letter-section" id="section-I">
<h2>I</h2>
<ul class="recipe-list">
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/Imperial%20Bourbon%20Barrel%20Chocolate%20Stout%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">Imperial Bourbon Barrel Chocolate Stout</a></li>
</ul>
</div>

<div class="letter-section" id="section-J">
<h2>J</h2>
<ul class="recipe-list">
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/Janets%20Brown%20Ale%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">Janets Brown Ale</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/Jollyville%20Red%20Ale%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">Jollyville Red Ale</a></li>
</ul>
</div>

<div class="letter-section" id="section-L">
<h2>L</h2>
<ul class="recipe-list">
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/Lake%20Buchana%20IPA%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Sheet.pdf">Lake Buchana IPA</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/Lake%20Travis%20IPA%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">Lake Travis IPA</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/Lemondrop%20Blonde%20Ale%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">Lemondrop Blonde Ale</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/Lofty%20Loblolly%20IPA%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">Lofty Loblolly IPA</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/Lonely%20Pier%20Wheat%20Ale%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">Lonely Pier Wheat Ale</a></li>
</ul>
</div>

<div class="letter-section" id="section-M">
<h2>M</h2>
<ul class="recipe-list">
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/Mad%20Jacks%20Hoppy%20Amber%20Ale%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">Mad Jacks Hoppy Amber Ale</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/Mars%20the%20Duck%20Oat%20Pale%20Ale%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">Mars the Duck Oat Pale Ale</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/Mosaic%20&%20Citra%20Pale%20Ale%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">Mosaic & Citra Pale Ale</a></li>
</ul>
</div>

<div class="letter-section" id="section-N">
<h2>N</h2>
<ul class="recipe-list">
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/Nearly%20Nirvana%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">Nearly Nirvana</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/Nectaron%20&%20Elani%20IPA%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">Nectaron & Elani IPA</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/Nectaron%20IPA%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">Nectaron IPA</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/Nectaron%20Pale%20Ale%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">Nectaron Pale Ale</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/New%20House%20English%20Brown%20Ale%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">New House English Brown Ale</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/New%20Zealand%20Blonde%20Ale%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">New Zealand Blonde Ale</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/New%20Zealand%20IPA%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">New Zealand IPA</a></li>
</ul>
</div>

<div class="letter-section" id="section-O">
<h2>O</h2>
<ul class="recipe-list">
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/Oat%20Dear%20I%20Created%20A%20Maltster%20Oat%20Stout%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">Oat Dear I Created A Maltster Oat Stout</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/Oat%20of%20Luck%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">Oat of Luck</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/Oatmeal%20Pale%20Ale%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">Oatmeal Pale Ale</a></li>
</ul>
</div>

<div class="letter-section" id="section-P">
<h2>P</h2>
<ul class="recipe-list">
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/Pacific%20Coast%20Juicy%20IPA%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">Pacific Coast Juicy IPA</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/Plodding%20Bear%20Porter%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">Plodding Bear Porter</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/Pool%20Floatie%20Amber%20Ale%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">Pool Floatie Amber Ale</a></li>
</ul>
</div>

<div class="letter-section" id="section-R">
<h2>R</h2>
<ul class="recipe-list">
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/Rooftop%20Sunbathing%20NEIPA%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">Rooftop Sunbathing NEIPA</a></li>
</ul>
</div>

<div class="letter-section" id="section-S">
<h2>S</h2>
<ul class="recipe-list">
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/Sabro%20Pale%20Ale%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">Sabro Pale Ale</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SandyPupJuicyIPA_AllGrain.pdf">SandyPupJuicyIPA_AllGrain</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/Seaside%20Ride%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">Seaside Ride</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20120%20Shilling%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo 120 Shilling</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%2060%20Shilling%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo 60 Shilling</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%2070%20Shilling%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo 70 Shilling</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%2080%20Shilling%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo 80 Shilling</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%2090%20Shilling%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo 90 Shilling</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20Ahoy%20Wheaty%20Wheat%20Ale%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo Ahoy Wheaty Wheat Ale</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20Amarillo%20Armadillo%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo Amarillo Armadillo</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20Amarillo%20IPA%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo Amarillo IPA</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20Amber%20Hue%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo Amber Hue</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20Amberserk%20Amber%20Ale%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo Amberserk Amber Ale</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20American%20Amber%20Ale%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo American Amber Ale</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20American%20Barleywine%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo American Barleywine</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20American%20Brown%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo American Brown</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20American%20Hefeweizen%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo American Hefeweizen</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20American%20Red%20Ale%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo American Red Ale</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20American%20Rye%20Ale%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo American Rye Ale</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20American%20Strong%20Ale%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo American Strong Ale</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20American%20Wheat%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo American Wheat</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20Anniversary%20IPA%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo Anniversary IPA</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20Apricot%20Saison%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo Apricot Saison</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20Apricot%20Wheat%20Ale%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo Apricot Wheat Ale</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20Australian%20Sparkling%20Ale%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo Australian Sparkling Ale</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20Bat%20Bridge%20Black%20IPA%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo Bat Bridge Black IPA</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20Bavarian%20Hefeweizen%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo Bavarian Hefeweizen</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20Beach%20Lounger%20Amber%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo Beach Lounger Amber</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20Belgian%20Dark%20Strong%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo Belgian Dark Strong</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20Belgian%20Dubbel%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo Belgian Dubbel</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20Belgian%20IPA%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo Belgian IPA</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20Belgian%20Pale%20Ale%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo Belgian Pale Ale</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20Belgian%20Saison%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo Belgian Saison</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20Belgian%20Stout%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo Belgian Stout</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20Belgian%20Tripel%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo Belgian Tripel</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20Berliner%20Weisse%20Advanced%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Sheet.pdf">SoCo Berliner Weisse Advanced</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20Berliner%20Weisse%20Easy%20All%20Grain%20Brewing%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo Berliner Weisse Easy</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20Best%20Bitter%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo Best Bitter</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20Black%20IPA%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo Black IPA</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20Black%20Licorice%20Porter%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo Black Licorice Porter</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20Blackberry%20Blonde%20Ale%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo Blackberry Blonde Ale</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20Blackberry%20Wheat%20Ale%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo Blackberry Wheat Ale</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20Blonde%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo Blonde</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20Blueberry%20Blonde%20Ale%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo Blueberry Blonde Ale</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20Blueberry%20Wheat%20Ale%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo Blueberry Wheat Ale</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20Breezy%20Nights%20Black%20Ale%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo Breezy Nights Black Ale</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20British%20Golden%20Ale%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo British Golden Ale</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20British%20Strong%20Ale%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo British Strong Ale</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20Brown%20IPA%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo Brown IPA</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20Brown%20Porter%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo Brown Porter</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20California%20Common%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo California Common</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20Cascadian%20Dark%20Ale%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo Cascadian Dark Ale</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20Centennial%20IPA%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo Centennial IPA</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20Chocolate%20Milk%20Stout%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo Chocolate Milk Stout</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20Chocolate%20Porter%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo Chocolate Porter</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20Chocolate%20Stout%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo Chocolate Stout</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20Christmas%20IPA%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo Christmas IPA</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20Citra%20Amarillo%20NEIPA%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo Citra Amarillo NEIPA</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20Citra%20Blonde%20Ale%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo Citra Blonde Ale</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20Citra%20IPA%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo Citra IPA</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20Citra%20Juicy%20NEIPA%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo Citra Juicy NEIPA</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20Citra%20Pale%20Ale%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo Citra Pale Ale</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20Citra%20SMaSH%20IPA%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo Citra SMaSH IPA</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20CitSim%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo CitSim</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20Coconut%20Porter%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo Coconut Porter</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20Coconut%20Wheat%20Ale%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo Coconut Wheat Ale</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20Columbus%20IPA%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo Columbus IPA</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20Dark%20Mild%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo Dark Mild</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20Dark%20Wheat%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo Dark Wheat</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20Doppelbock%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo Doppelbock</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20Double%20Brown%20Ale%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo Double Brown Ale</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20Double%20Chocolate%20Stout%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo Double Chocolate Stout</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20Double%20Wit%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo Double Wit</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20Dunkelweizen%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo Dunkelweizen</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20Eclipse%20Black%20Blonde%20Ale%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo Eclipse Black Blonde Ale</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20Eclipse%20Black%20IPA%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo Eclipse Black IPA</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20English%20Barleywine%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo English Barleywine</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20English%20Brown%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo English Brown</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20English%20IPA%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo English IPA</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20English%20Porter%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo English Porter</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20ESB%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo ESB</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20Falconers%20Flight%20Pale%20Ale%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo Falconers Flight Pale Ale</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20Faux%20Coffee%20Stout%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo Faux Coffee Stout</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20Flying%20Kiwi%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo Flying Kiwi</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20Gose%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo Gose</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20Gose%20Kettle%20Sour%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Sheet.pdf">SoCo Gose Kettle Sour</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20Goud%20Belgian%20Pale%20Ale%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo Goud Belgian Pale Ale</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20Grapefruit%20IPA%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo Grapefruit IPA</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20Grodziskie%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo Grodziskie</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20Hefeweizen%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo Hefeweizen</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20Holiday%20Stout%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo Holiday Stout</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20Honey%20Badger%20Brown%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo Honey Badger Brown</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20Honey%20Wheat%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo Honey Wheat</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20Hoppy%20Wheat%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo Hoppy Wheat</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20Imperial%20Blonde%20Ale%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo Imperial Blonde Ale</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20Imperial%20Irish%20Red%20Ale%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo Imperial Irish Red Ale</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20Imperial%20Nut%20Brown%20Ale%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo Imperial Nut Brown Ale</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20IPA%20IPA%20Double%20IPA%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Sheet.pdf">SoCo IPA IPA Double IPA</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20Irish%20Extra%20Stout%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo Irish Extra Stout</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20Irish%20Red%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo Irish Red</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20Irish%20Stout%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo Irish Stout</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20Island%20Chicken%20Pale%20Ale%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo Island Chicken Pale Ale</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20Leaky%20Tent%20Stout%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo Leaky Tent Stout</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20Light%20Blonde%20Ale%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo Light Blonde Ale</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20London%20Brown%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo London Brown</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20Maddies%20English%20Porter%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo Maddies English Porter</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20McKinney%20Falls%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo McKinney Falls</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20Menchaca%20Hefeweizen%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo Menchaca Hefeweizen</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20Milk%20Stout%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo Milk Stout</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20Milkshake%20IPA%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions%20(1).pdf">SoCo Milkshake IPA (1)</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20Moontower%20White%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo Moontower White</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20Mosaic%20SMaSH%20IPA%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo Mosaic SMaSH IPA</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20Mugwort%20Lemon%20Gruit%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo Mugwort Lemon Gruit</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20Mugwort%20Red%20Ale%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo Mugwort Red Ale</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20Nut%20Brown%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo Nut Brown</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20Oat%20Stout%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo Oat Stout</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20Oatmeal%20Brown%20Ale%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo Oatmeal Brown Ale</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20Oktoberfest%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo Oktoberfest</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20Old%20Ale%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo Old Ale</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20Ordinary%20Bitter%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo Ordinary Bitter</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20Passion%20Fruit%20Saison%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo Passion Fruit Saison</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20Patersbier%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo Patersbier</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20Pecan%20Brown%20Ale%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo Pecan Brown Ale</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20Pecan%20Porter%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo Pecan Porter</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20Pennybacker%20Double%20IPA%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo Pennybacker Double IPA</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20Peppermint%20Chocolate%20Milk%20Stout%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo Peppermint Chocolate Milk Stout</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20Pink%20Boots%20Society%20Red%20Ale%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo Pink Boots Society Red Ale</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20Porter%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo Porter</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20Raspberry%20Blonde%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo Raspberry Blonde</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20Raspberry%20Wheat%20Ale%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo Raspberry Wheat Ale</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20Red%20APA%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo Red APA</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20Red%20Hot%20Red%20Ale%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo Red Hot Red Ale</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20Red%20IPA%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo Red IPA</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20Red%20Ryerson%20Roggenbier%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo Red Ryerson Roggenbier</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20Robust%20Porter%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo Robust Porter</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20Russian%20Imperial%20Stout%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo Russian Imperial Stout</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20Rye%20IPA%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo Rye IPA</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20Rye%20Lager%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo Rye Lager</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20Rye%20Pale%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo Rye Pale</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20Rye%20Stout%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo Rye Stout</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20Sabro%20IPA%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Sheet.pdf">SoCo Sabro IPA</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20Sasquatch%20Street%20Brown%20Ale%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo Sasquatch Street Brown Ale</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20Schwarzbier%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo Schwarzbier</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20Scottish%20Export%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo Scottish Export</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20Scottish%20Heavy%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo Scottish Heavy</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20Scottish%20Light%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo Scottish Light</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20Serendipitous%20Citrus%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo Serendipitous Citrus</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20SimCitIPA%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo SimCitIPA</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20Simcoe%20IPA%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo Simcoe IPA</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20Simcoe%20Pale%20Ale%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo Simcoe Pale Ale</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20Simcoe%20SMaSH%20IPA%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo Simcoe SMaSH IPA</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20Smoky%20Brown%20Ale%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo Smoky Brown Ale</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20Smoky%20Porter%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo Smoky Porter</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20South%20Lamar%20IPA%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo South Lamar IPA</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20Spiced%20IPA%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo Spiced IPA</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20Spiced%20Porter%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo Spiced Porter</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20Spiced%20Stout%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo Spiced Stout</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20Strata%20Pale%20Ale%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo Strata Pale Ale</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20Strawberry%20Blonde%20Ale%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo Strawberry Blonde Ale</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20Strawberry%20Wheat%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo Strawberry Wheat</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20Strong%20Amber%20Ale%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo Strong Amber Ale</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20Strong%20American%20Porter%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo Strong American Porter</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20Strong%20Scotch%20Ale%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo Strong Scotch Ale</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20Strong%20Winter%20Ale%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo Strong Winter Ale</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20Summer%20Wheat%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo Summer Wheat</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20Texas%20Amber%20Ale%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo Texas Amber Ale</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20Texas%20Blonde%20Ale%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo Texas Blonde Ale</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20Texas%20Brown%20Ale%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo Texas Brown Ale</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20Texas%20Citra%20IPA%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo Texas Citra IPA</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20Texas%20Golden%20Ale%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo Texas Golden Ale</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20Texas%20Hefeweizen%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo Texas Hefeweizen</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20Texas%20IPA%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo Texas IPA</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20Texas%20Juicy%20IPA%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Sheet.pdf">SoCo Texas Juicy IPA</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20Texas%20Kolsch%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo Texas Kolsch</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20Texas%20Mosaic%20IPA%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo Texas Mosaic IPA</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20Texas%20Pale%20Ale%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo Texas Pale Ale</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20Texas%20Porter%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo Texas Porter</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20Texas%20Red%20Ale%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo Texas Red Ale</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20Texas%20Stout%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo Texas Stout</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20Texas%20Strong%20Ale%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo Texas Strong Ale</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20The%20Hard%20Way%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo The Hard Way</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20Town%20Lake%20IPA%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo Town Lake IPA</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20Tropical%20Stout%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo Tropical Stout</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20Vanilla%20Cream%20Porter%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo Vanilla Cream Porter</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20Vic%20Secret%20Pale%20Ale%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo Vic Secret Pale Ale</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20Vienna%20Lager%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo Vienna Lager</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20Vista%20IPA%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo Vista IPA</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20Wandering%20Egret%20Amber%20Ale%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo Wandering Egret Amber Ale</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20Warm%20Winter%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo Warm Winter</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20Watermelon%20Blonde%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo Watermelon Blonde</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20West%20Coast%20IPA%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo West Coast IPA</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20West%20Coast%20Pale%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo West Coast Pale</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20Wheatwine%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo Wheatwine</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20Whiskey%20Barrel%20Stout%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo Whiskey Barrel Stout</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20White%20Chocolate%20Blonde%20Ale%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo White Chocolate Blonde Ale</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20White%20Stout%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo White Stout</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20Whole%20Lotta%20Citrus%20NEIPA%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo Whole Lotta Citrus NEIPA</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20Witbier%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo Witbier</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20Yellow%20Bells%20Juicy%20NEIPA%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo Yellow Bells Juicy NEIPA</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20Yodeling%20Coyote%20Oktoberfest%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo Yodeling Coyote Oktoberfest</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo%20Zilker%20Park%20Pale%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">SoCo Zilker Park Pale</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/SoCo-Fastest-IPA-in-the-Galaxy-All-Grain-Recipe.pdf">SoCo-Fastest-IPA-in-the-Galaxy</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/South%20Austins%20Best%20Bitter%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">South Austins Best Bitter</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/Squawking%20Parrot%20IPA%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">Squawking Parrot IPA</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/Stalwart%20Bulldog%20ESB%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">Stalwart Bulldog ESB</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/Stein%20Half%20Full%20Oktoberfest%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20V2.pdf">Stein Half Full Oktoberfest</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/Strawberry%20Milk%20Stout%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">Strawberry Milk Stout</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/Summer%20Waves%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">Summer Waves</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/Superdelic%20Pale%20Ale%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">Superdelic Pale Ale</a></li>
</ul>
</div>

<div class="letter-section" id="section-T">
<h2>T</h2>
<ul class="recipe-list">
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/Talus%20Pale%20Ale%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">Talus Pale Ale</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/Texas%20Best%20Bitter%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">Texas Best Bitter</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/Texas%20Christmas%20Red%20Ale%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">Texas Christmas Red Ale</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/Texas%20Dunkelweizen%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">Texas Dunkelweizen</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/Texas%20Milk%20Stout%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">Texas Milk Stout</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/Texas%20Oat%20Stout%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">Texas Oat Stout</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/Texas%20Pilsner%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">Texas Pilsner</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/Texas%20Style%20Irish%20Stout%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">Texas Style Irish Stout</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/TexasBigtooth%20Amber%20Ale%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">TexasBigtooth Amber Ale</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/Tops%20For%20The%20Win%20Pale%20Ale%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">Tops For The Win Pale Ale</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/Tree%20Bench%20Brown%20Ale%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">Tree Bench Brown Ale</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/Tropical%20Heavens%20IPA%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">Tropical Heavens IPA</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/Turtle%20Pile%20Golden%20Ale%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">Turtle Pile Golden Ale</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/Two%20Z's%20IPA%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">Two Z's IPA</a></li>
</ul>
</div>

<div class="letter-section" id="section-V">
<h2>V</h2>
<ul class="recipe-list">
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/Vienna%20Amber%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">Vienna Amber</a></li>
</ul>
</div>

<div class="letter-section" id="section-W">
<h2>W</h2>
<ul class="recipe-list">
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/Wauterss%20Belgian%20Dubbel%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">Wauterss Belgian Dubbel</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/West%20Coast%20Blonde%20Ale%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">West Coast Blonde Ale</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/West%20Coast%20Lager%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">West Coast Lager</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/Wheatys%20Comet%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">Wheatys Comet</a></li>
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/Winter%20Red%20Ale%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">Winter Red Ale</a></li>
</ul>
</div>

<div class="letter-section" id="section-Y">
<h2>Y</h2>
<ul class="recipe-list">
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/You%20Had%20Me%20At%20Amber%20Ale%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">You Had Me At Amber Ale</a></li>
</ul>
</div>

<div class="letter-section" id="section-Z">
<h2>Z</h2>
<ul class="recipe-list">
  <li class="recipe-item"><a href="recipe-pdfs/Zappa%20IPA%20All%20Grain%20Recipe%20Instructions.pdf">Zappa IPA</a></li>
</ul>
</div>

<p id="no-results">No recipes match your search.</p>

<script>
  const searchInput = document.getElementById("recipe-search");
  searchInput.addEventListener("input", function () {
    const query = this.value.toLowerCase().trim();
    let anyVisible = false;

    document.querySelectorAll(".letter-section").forEach(function (section) {
      let sectionHasVisible = false;
      section.querySelectorAll(".recipe-item").forEach(function (li) {
        const text = li.textContent.toLowerCase();
        const match = !query || text.includes(query);
        li.style.display = match ? "" : "none";
        if (match) sectionHasVisible = true;
      });
      section.style.display = sectionHasVisible ? "" : "none";
      if (sectionHasVisible) anyVisible = true;
    });

    document.getElementById("no-results").style.display = anyVisible ? "none" : "block";
  });
</script>
```
